vulnerability.title: Verify Permissions on Backup shadow File
vulnerability.description: To properly set the permissions of /etc/shadow-, run the command: $ sudo chmod 0000 /etc/shadow-

triage_decision.reason: The finding concerns the permissions of a backup shadow file (/etc/shadow-), not the active /etc/shadow file. Restricting permissions on a backup file is a standard hardening practice and does not impact system authentication or service availability.
